positive: A minimalist vector illustration of a mystical forest lantern. The scene features stylized silhouettes of ancient, glowing trees and fantastical bioluminescent flora surrounding a central, intricately designed lantern. The lantern emits warm, golden light that contrasts sharply with deep twilight blues and rich emerald greens. The style is modern Nordic folk art meets Art Nouveau, emphasizing clean lines, sharp contrast, and perfect symmetry. Suitable for a print on fabric, isolated on a clean background. Highly detailed, crisp vector quality, symmetrical composition, perfect center focus, high contrast, maximalist pattern potential, clean silhouette design.
